_instructions.slide_naming: slide-01.jpg, slide-02.jpg ... (exported from PowerPoint → File → Export → JPEG/PNG)
_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: Python Syntax Concepts
subtitle: Write Your First Python Program!
overview: Students are introduced to Python programming language and learn the basic syntax rules. They write their first Python script, run it in an IDE, understand print statements, comments, variables, and common programming errors. This session lays the foundation for future Python programming lessons.

images._note: Add screenshots of Python IDEs, code examples, and student coding activities.

youtubeVideos.title: Python for Beginners
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn the basics of Python programming.

youtubeVideos.title: Python Tutorial for Kids and Beginners
youtubeVideos.desc: Introduction to Python syntax and coding.

youtubeVideos.title: Thonny IDE Tutorial
youtubeVideos.desc: Getting started with Python using Thonny IDE.

activity.title: Write and Run Your First Python Script
steps: Click Run to execute the program
Add another print statement with your name
Create a variable and store your age
Discuss syntax errors and how to fix them

quiz.explanation: Python is a popular and easy-to-learn programming language.

quiz.q: Which symbol is used to create comments in Python?
Which function is used to display output in Python?
quiz.explanation: print() is used to display text and values.

quiz.q: What is the extension of a Python file?
quiz.explanation: Python files are saved with a .py extension.

quiz.q: Which IDE is commonly used by beginners for Python?
quiz.explanation: Thonny is a beginner-friendly Python IDE.
Variables are used to store information.
Python is case-sensitive and uses lowercase print().

quiz.q: What happens when you click Run in an IDE?
Why is indentation important in Python?
quiz.explanation: Python uses indentation to organize blocks of code.
The print() function displays the text inside quotes.
